subheadline: A small maintainer council at webconsulting studio decides what lands in each Desiderio release.

members.name: Sofia Berg
members.title: Project Lead
members.bio: Owns the release train from 1.0 to today's 2.6, including the jump to 255 content elements and per-page theme presets.

members.name: Noah Ritter
members.title: Accessibility Steward
members.bio: Keeps every component WCAG-minded: focus states, ARIA, and screen-reader copy are reviewed before any element ships.

members.name: Lea Fischer
members.title: Quality & Audit Lead
members.bio: Runs the 11-category template audit and the PHPStan-level-max CI gate that every pull request has to pass.
